last_action: Cleared all room, tenant, and billing data from the database to allow for a fresh multi-building setup.
summary: Phase 8: Security & UI Refinement. Successfully implemented multi-building support and security enhancements. The database has been cleared of legacy room and tenant data to prepare for the new multi-building organizational structure.
next_steps: Test the full 'Forgot Password' flow with actual SMTP settings.
Conduct a security audit of all admin endpoints to ensure 'get_admin' dependency is applied everywhere.
Implement building-level filtering for financial reports and room lists.

team_notes.Gemini-CLI: The system is now significantly more secure with hashed passwords and lockout protection. UI clarity improved by splitting meter and repair sections. Direct bcrypt usage resolved passlib compatibility bugs.
